documented_deviations: src/utils/procedureLifespanHelpers.ts: exported the existing DAYS_PER_MONTH constant so forecastTimelineHelpers converts config months to dates without duplicating the 30.44 convention. No behavior change.

tests/clinic-forecast-timeline/clinic-screen-forecast-timeline.test.tsx: replaced the pre-implementation virtual/relative-path ForecastTimeline mock with a plain aliased jest.mock — the virtual mock registers under the unresolved path, so once the real module existed jest resolved past it and rendered the real component (3/6 failed). Mock plumbing only; assertions untouched. Both deviations are detailed in progress/clinic-forecast-timeline.md.
engineer_notes.testid_contract: Implemented verbatim from the fixtures.ts header comment (root forecast-timeline, forecast-month-{0..11} with accessibilityLabel/accessibilityState, forecast-row-{row}, forecast-track-{procedureId} button + phase-word label, forecast-segment-{procedureId}-cobalt/-amber).
